results.description: Actor Timothy Busfield’s defense team is asking a New Mexico court to throw out the indictment against its client that was handed down in February. The Emmy Award winner is charged with four counts of criminal sexual contact with a...

results.title: Thap Lan land disputes linger
results.description: Siho Uthakayotha, 63, was expected to be celebrating. After decades of uncertainty over land occupied by his community near Thap Lan National Park in Nakhon Ratchasima, a decision to remove 155,865 rai of overlapping land from the park boundary was viewed as a long-awaited breakthrough.

results.title: Cuban PM floats sweeping reforms to privatize vast swath of economy
results.description: Cuba's prime minister on Thursday presented lawmakers with sweeping reforms backed by the Communist Party and former leader Raúl Castro that would privatize a ‌vast swath of its socialist economy in a bid to survive punishing U.S. sanctions.

results.title: Nicola Valley Hospital to face first emergency closure of 2026
results.description: The Nicola Valley Hospital will be forced to close its emergency department this week for the first time this year. Interior Health released an announcement on Thursday afternoon that the department will shutter from 7.a.m on Friday, June 19, to 8.a.m on Saturday, June 20.
